svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="20"> <diagram name="Report Workflow" id="report-workflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="938" dy="676" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="draft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5B041;strokeColor=#B9770E;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Draft" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="420" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="waiting" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E86C1;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Waiting for Review" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="400" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="viewed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#AED6F1;strokeColor=#2874A6;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Viewed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="420" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sealed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#58D68D;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=18;" value="Complete/Locked" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="409" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="draft" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="waiting" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Send Final Report (evaluator)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="waiting" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;" target="viewed" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">View Report (evaluatee)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0809" y="5" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="viewed" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="sealed" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Acknowledge Report (evaluatee)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="480" y="460" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="460" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#E67E22;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#6E4018;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;border:1px solid #E67E22;">Mark Complete (evaluator)</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0036" y="-27" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-1" as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="631" y="276" /> <mxPoint x="741" y="395" /> <mxPoint x="741" y="375" /> <mxPoint x="741" y="405" /> <mxPoint x="741" y="415" /> <mxPoint x="691" y="475" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="560" y="233" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="559" y="563" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="52" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-std-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#FFFFFF;" value="Standard path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="118" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-shortcut-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#FFFFFF;" value="Evaluator override
(skips acknowledgement)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="150" x="118" y="108" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MWk8UWk8L-IF30dAakXD-2" edge="1" parent="1" source="viewed" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#E67E22;strokeWidth=2.5;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="490" y="380" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="610" y="385" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
